message:
test(table): add edge case tests for column width algorithms (bd-2ec5)

Added 10 new tests covering edge cases in table column width calculation:
- Extremely narrow table width
- Ratio-based column sizing
- Mixed ratio and fixed-width columns
- All columns at minimum width
- Conflicting min/max width constraints
- Zero-width columns
- Very long words that can't wrap
- All ratios being zero
- Single huge cell exceeding table width
- Width exactly equals border overhead

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
